phase: Phase 1 — person-swap of the NEW depth verbo items
method: Mechanical person-swap of pronoun-subject standard verbo items from the content-depth pass. Conjugations via verbecc (verbecc-verified against the native-checked base answer). Options = sibling person-forms in the same tense; deduped vs the whole bank. Reflexive / progressive / impersonal / noun-subject / implied-subject items and the 1st-person-singular cell of subjunctive items (coreference) were excluded.
